subcodes.first_line: O Riḍá! We have been pleased with thee, and God hath been pleased with thee. Therefore take pride in thyself and place thy trust in God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا رضا قد رضینا عنک و رضی الله منک و بذلک فافتخر فی نفسک فتوکل علی الله
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @mindfulness; concentration; focus, @suffering and imprisonment, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
